mapper.select: select wq.problem_id as problemId, p.difficulty as difficulty, wq.last_wrong_type as lastWrongType, wq.wrong_count as wrongCount from wrong_questions wq join problems p on p.id = wq.problem_id where wq.user_id = #{userId} order by wq.wrong_count desc, wq.last_wrong_at desc limit #{limit}

select distinct pt.tag_id from problem_tags pt where pt.problem_id in
#{id}

select rr.id, rr.trigger_source as triggerSource, rr.trigger_ref_id as triggerRefId, rr.resource_type as resourceType, rr.resource_id as resourceId, rr.problem_id as problemId, p.title as problemTitle, p.difficulty as difficulty, rr.reason_text as reasonText, rr.ai_source as aiSource, rr.ai_model as aiModel, rr.score, rr.recommended_at as recommendedAt from recommendation_records rr left join problems p on p.id = rr.problem_id where rr.user_id = #{userId} order by rr.recommended_at desc, rr.id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
